subcodes.first_line: O steadfast company and firm band, faithful to God's Covenant and Testament! With an expansive heart and a throbbing soul, I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها العصبه الثابته و الثله الراسخه علی عهد الله و میثاقه اننی بصدر واسع و قلب خافق
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @importance of community building, @firmness in the Covenant, @being a source of light; guidance
